stages.concept:
# Unit 054: 조동사 can - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **조동사 can**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> I **can** swim very well.
> 나는 수영을 매우 잘 할 수 있다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **can**은 여러 의미로 쓰여요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **능력** — ~할 수 있다

> She **can** speak three languages.
> 그녀는 세 가지 언어를 말할 수 있다.

**Q. 다음 중 can이 '능력'의 의미로 쓰인 것을 고르세요.**
1. Can you open the door? (요청)
2. You can sit here. (허가)
3. He can play the piano well. ✅ (능력)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **허가** — ~해도 된다

> You **can** use my pen.
> 내 펜을 사용해도 돼.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **요청** — ~해 주실래요?

> **Can** you help me?
> 도와주실 수 있어요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **부정**: **cannot (can't)** — ~할 수 없다

> I **can't** drive a car yet.
> 나는 아직 운전을 할 수 없다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: can의 과거형은 **could**예요.

> I **could** swim when I was five.
> 나는 다섯 살 때 수영을 할 수 있었다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **be able to**로 바꿔 쓸 수도 있어요.

> He **is able to** play the guitar.
> 그는 기타를 연주할 수 있다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: can은 능력, 허가, 요청! 과거형은 could, 같은 뜻으로 be able to도 쓸 수 있군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 054: 조동사 can - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She can (     ) well.
> **정답** cook

---

**02.** He can ? the guitar.
> **정답** play

---

**03.** ? you speak English?
> **정답** Can

---

**04.** I can ? fast.
> **정답** run

---

**05.** They can ? a song together.
> **정답** sing

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She can swims very well.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** swims → swim

---

**07.** He cans ride a bicycle.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** cans → can

---

**08.** Can she plays the piano?
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** plays → play

---

**09.** I can not speaks French.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** speaks → speak

---

**10.** They can to dance very well.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to dance → dance

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나는 수영을 할 수 있다.
I swim.
> **정답** can

---

**12.** 그녀는 한국어를 말할 수 있다.
She speak Korean.
> **정답** can

---

**13.** 너는 자전거를 탈 수 있니?
you ride a bicycle?
> **정답** Can

---

**14.** 그는 높이 점프할 수 있다.
He jump high.
> **정답** can

---

**15.** 나는 매운 음식을 먹을 수 없다.
I eat spicy food.
> **정답** can't (cannot)

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀는 피아노를 잘 칠 수 있다.
She the piano can play well
> **정답** She / can / play / the / piano / well

---

**17.** 나는 100미터를 빠르게 달릴 수 있다.
can I run 100 meters fast
> **정답** I / can / run / 100 / meters / fast

---

**18.** 너는 이 문제를 풀 수 있니?
solve Can this you problem
> **정답** Can / you / solve / this / problem

---

**19.** 그들은 영어를 잘 말할 수 있다.
can They English speak well
> **정답** They / can / speak / English / well

---

**20.** 그는 기타를 칠 수 없다.
can't He play the guitar
> **정답** He / can't / play / the / guitar
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 054: 조동사 can - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
I __________ swim last year, but I __________ swim
now after learning.
couldn't - can
can't - can
could - could
could - couldn't
> **정답** couldn't - can

---

**02.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 말을 고르시오.
Amy can play this role in the play.
are able to
was able to
will
is able to
• play 연기하다
• the play 연극
> **정답** is able to

---

**03.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그들은 내년에 태권도를 배울 수 있을 것이다.
They will can learn Taekwondo next year.
They will be able to learn Taekwondo next
year.
They will learn Taekwondo next year.
They were able to learn Taekwondo next year.
> **정답** They will be able to learn Taekwondo next year.

---

**04.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Tom will can use the computer tomorrow.
Amy is able to solve the problem.
Jake could have lunch with his friend
yesterday.
Ben can tell the twins apart.
• tell apart 구별하다
> **정답** Tom will can use the computer tomorrow.

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Can Amy participate in this game?
Tom is able to play the harp.
You will be able to ride my bicycle.
Can you able to write that report?
> **정답** Can you able to write that report?

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
She will can have dinner with us tomorrow.
He will able to leave the hospital tomorrow.
I was able to finish my homework last night.
He can translate the report into English.
• translate 번역하다
> **정답** I was able to finish my homework last night., He can
translate the report into English.

---

**07.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 말을 고르시오.
You can't pay by credit card in this store.
isn't going to
aren't able to
won't
isn't able to
• credit card 신용카드
> **정답** aren't able to

---

**08.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
A: __________ I use this tablet for drawing?
B: I'm sorry, you __________. This is not mine.
Will - won't
Am - are
Can - can't
Can't - can
> **정답** Can - can't

---

**09.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
Tom은 내일 정각에 도착할 수 있을까?
Is Tom able to arrived on time
tomorrow?
> **정답** Is, arrive

---

**10.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 같은 의미로 쓰인 것을
고르시오.
<보기> You can only use this computer during the test.
You can eat all the food in this cafe.
Monkeys can climb tall trees.
He can speak three languages.
She can play tennis.
> **정답** You can eat all the food in this cafe.

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분의 뜻이 나머지와 다른 것을 고르시오.
He has learned to swim for five years. He can
swim very well.
She can speak Chinese like a native speaker.
She can lift the heavy box.
You can't fly a drone here. This place is a
licensed area.
• licensed area 허가구역
> **정답** You can't fly a drone here. This place is a licensed
area.

---

**12.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 작년에 스케이트보드를 탈 수 없었다.
Tom couldn't able to ride a skateboard last
year.
Tom cannot ride a skateboard last year.
Tom was not able to ride a skateboard last
year.
Tom is not able to ride a skateboard last
year.
> **정답** Tom was not able to ride a skateboard last year.

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분의 뜻이 나머지와 다른 것을 고르시오.
They can't cook Chinese food.
He can't run fast.
He can't fish in this lake. The lake is closed.
She studied very hard. She can pass the test.
• fish 낚시하다
> **정답** He can't fish in this lake. The lake is closed.

---

**14.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
예술의 전당에 가는 길을 알려주실 수 있나요?
Do you tell me the way to the Seoul Arts
Center?
> **정답** Can (Could), tell

---

**15.** 다음 빈칸에 can이 들어갈 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
Anyone __________ be able to use the
computer.
Dogs __________ bark loudly when they see a
stranger.
The package __________ arrive today.
Cats __________ walk quietly.
• bark 짖다
• package 소포
> **정답** Anyone __________ be able to use the computer.

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She can not makes her friend
sad.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** makes → make

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Giraffes is able to grow up
to 5 meters.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** is → are

---

**18.** 밑줄 친 부분의 뜻이 나머지와 다른 것을 고르시오.
Can I close the door?
You can use my pen.
I can run fast.
They can borrow this book.
> **정답** I can run fast.

---

**19.** 다음 중 문맥상 can을 사용하기에 어색한 것을 고르시오.
You ______ cross the street on a red light.
We ______ have breakfast at the restaurant.
He ______ play the guitar.
They ______ use this computer all the time.
> **정답** You ______ cross the street on a red light.

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
(2개)
She joined a music club three months ago.
She is not able to sing a song
well at that time. But she could sing
very well now. She will sing a song at
the concert next month.
> **정답** joined, was not able to, can, will sing
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 054 조동사 can중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그는 운전을 할 수 있다.
힌트 (     ) be, drive a car
He  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 is, able, to, drive, a, car

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오. (축약형으로 쓸 것)
Jason은 지난 밤 소음 때문에 잠을 잘 수가 없었다.
힌트 (     ) sleep
Jason  (     )   (     )  last night because of the noise.
정답 couldn't, sleep

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
나에게 그 책을 건네줄 수 있니?
힌트 (     ) pass, the book
 you  (     )  me  (     )   (     ) (     )
정답 Can (Could), pass, the, book

---

**04.** 주어진 단어를 이용하여, 다음 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
A: Can he ski? I want to ski with him.
B: No, he  (     ) .
정답 can't

---

**05.** 주어진 단어를 이용하여, 다음 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
A: What kind of food can she cook?
B: She  (     )   (     )  both Korean and Indian
food. [cook]
정답 can, cook

---

**06.** 주어진 단어를 이용하여, 다음 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
A: Help yourself, you can eat all the dishes here.
B: Thank you. I am really hungry. I  (     )  
  (     )  all the dishes. [be able to, eat]
• Help yourself (음식을) 마음대로[양껏] 드십시오
정답 am, able, to, eat

---

**07.** 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
우리 팀은 이 야구경기에서 이길 수 있다.
힌트 (     ) be able to, win
Our team  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  this baseball
game.
정답 is, able, to, win

---

**08.** 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
아빠가 내일 내 컴퓨터를 고쳐 줄 수 있을 것이다.
힌트 (     ) fix
My father  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  my
computer tomorrow.
정답 will, be, able, to, fix

---

**09.** 두 문장이 같은 뜻이 되도독 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
My mom can make delicious pizza.
→ My mom  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  delicious
pizza.
정답 is, able, to, make

---

**10.** 두 문장이 같은 뜻이 되도독 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
Can you sing this song?
→  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  this song?
정답 Are, you, able, to, sing

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 054: 조동사 can - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I __________ cook last year, but I __________ cook now after learning. couldn't - can can't - can could - could could - couldn't
> 정답: couldn't - can

---

**02.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 말을 고르시오.
Tom can play this role in the play. are able to was able to will is able to
> 정답: is able to

---

**03.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그들은 내년에 피아노를 배울 수 있을 것이다.
They will can learn piano next year.
They will be able to learn piano next year.
They will learn piano next year.
They were able to learn piano next year.
> 정답: They will be able to learn piano next year.

---

**04.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Jake will can use the tablet tomorrow.
Mina is able to solve the puzzle.
Amy could have lunch with her friend yesterday.
Tom can tell the twins apart.
> 정답: Jake will can use the tablet tomorrow.

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Can Amy join this game?
Tom is able to play the drums.
You will be able to ride my scooter.
Can you able to write that essay?
> 정답: Can you able to write that essay?

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
She will can have lunch with us tomorrow.
He will able to leave the school soon.
I was able to finish my project last night.
He can read the book in English.
> 정답: I was able to finish my project last night., He can

---

**07.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 말을 고르시오.
You can't pay by credit card in this cafe. isn't going to aren't able to won't isn't able to
> 정답: aren't able to

---

**08.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
A: __________ I use this pen for drawing?
B: I'm sorry, you __________.
This is not mine.
Will - won't Am - are Can - can't Can't - can
> 정답: Can - can't

---

**09.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
Jake는 내일 정각에 도착할 수 있을까?
Is Jake able to arrived on time tomorrow?
> 정답: Is, arrive

---

**10.** 다음 보기의 밑줄 친 부분과 같은 의미로 쓰인 것을 고르시오.
<보기> You can only use this room during the break.
You can eat all the snacks at this party.
Cats can see in the dark.
He can speak two languages.
She can play the violin.
> 정답: You can eat all the snacks at this party.

---

**11.** 밑줄 친 부분의 뜻이 나머지와 다른 것을 고르시오.
He has practiced drawing for three years.
He can draw very well.
She can speak Japanese like a native speaker.
She can lift the heavy box.
You can't ride a bike here.
This area is not allowed.
> 정답: You can't ride a bike here. This area is not allowed.

---

**12.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 작년에 인라인스케이트를 탈 수 없었다.
Tom couldn't able to ride inline skates last year.
Tom cannot ride inline skates last year.
Tom was not able to ride inline skates last year.
Tom is not able to ride inline skates last year.
> 정답: Tom was not able to ride inline skates last year.

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분의 뜻이 나머지와 다른 것을 고르시오.
They can't cook Japanese food.
He can't run fast.
He can't swim in this pool.
The pool is closed.
She studied very hard.
She can pass the exam.
> 정답: He can't swim in this pool. The pool is closed.

---

**14.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
도서관에 가는 길을 알려주실 수 있나요?
Do you tell me the way to the city library?
> 정답: Can (Could), tell

---

**15.** 다음 빈칸에 can이 들어갈 수 없는 것을 고르시오.
Anyone __________ be able to use the phone.
Dogs __________ bark loudly when they see a visitor.
The letter __________ arrive today.
Birds __________ fly high in the sky.
> 정답: Anyone __________ be able to use the phone.

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. She  can  not  makes  her  classmate sad. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: makes → make

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Elephants  is  able  to  remember many  things. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: is → are

---

**18.** 밑줄 친 부분의 뜻이 나머지와 다른 것을 고르시오.
Can I close the window?
You can use my eraser.
I can jump high.
They can borrow this DVD.
> 정답: I can jump high.

---

**19.** 다음 중 문맥상 can을 사용하기에 어색한 것을 고르시오.
You ______ cross the street on a red light.
We ______ have lunch at the cafeteria.
He ______ play the drums.
They ______ use this laptop all the time.
> 정답: You ______ cross the street on a red light.

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
(2개) She joined an art club three months ago.
She is not able to draw a picture well at that time.
But she could draw very well now.
She will draw a picture at the show next month.
> 정답: joined, was not able to, can, will draw
